category_sources: Official diffstat page says diffstat reads diff output and displays a histogram of per-file insertions, deletions, and modifications.
source_facts.description says it produces a graph of changes introduced by a diff file.
display_name_sources: Official invisible-island page and manpage use diffstat.
docs_sources: Official invisible-island diffstat page has a Documentation section linking the diffstat program docs.
Official invisible-island manpage documents invocation and behavior.
repo_sources: Official invisible-island page provides source downloads and archives but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official page and manpage describe histograms and summaries for large patch files.
source_facts.description describes graphing changes from a diff file.
